sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114670" key="xrhsmopeuste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμο-πευστέω</orth>, <sense id="n114670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consult an oracle, An.Bachm.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.418</biblScope> </bibl> (ubi male <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πνευστοῦντι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
